name: Grand Central Oyster Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except the half-and-half and 1 tablespoon of butter, at the top part of a double boiler over boiling water. Ensure the top pan does not touch the water.
2. Whisk briskly and constantly for about 1 minute until oysters begin to curl slightly.
3. Add the half-and-half and continue stirring briskly until just a boil is reached. Do not boil.
4. Serve piping hot, topped with the remaining butter and sprinkled with paprika.
Note: To make more servings, prepare in batches of two. Have bowls heated and preheat the half-and-half before adding.
